questions.question: Compare the key features of LetNet-5 with other popular deep convolutional neural networks. How do these features contribute to its performance?
questions.hint: Consider the architecture, layering, and depth of the network

questions.question: Describe the module-by-module architecture of LetNet-5. How does the network handle feature extraction and classification?
questions.hint: Focus on the convolutional and pooling layers, as well as the fully connected layers

questions.question: What are the advantages and disadvantages of using LetNet-5 for image classification tasks? Provide evidence from your understanding of the network's architecture and performance.
questions.hint: Consider the trade-offs between accuracy, computational cost, and model complexity
